headline: Super for local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies

site_brief.audience: local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work.
queries: local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies AI assistant
local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies

summary: A conversion‑focused niche landing page for local service businesses that live and die by speed‑to‑lead. Super is positioned as a personal AI agent that actually operates booking systems, inboxes, and CRM tools — and reuses a computer‑use cache so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper over time. The page ties real market evidence about AI workflow automation, computer‑use agents, and security risks to the daily realities of missed calls, slow quotes, and inbox overload.
